nasb.text: ‘You said, “Ah, woe is me! For the Lord has added sorrow to my pain; I am weary with my groaning and have found no rest.” ’

esv.text: You said, ‘Woe is me! For the Lord has added sorrow to my pain. I am weary with my groaning, and I find no rest.’

cnv.text: ‘你曾說：我有禍了！因為耶和華在我的痛苦上加添憂愁。我因唉哼而困乏，得不著安寧。’”

ccb.text: ‘你曾说，我真悲惨！因为耶和华使我痛上加痛，呻吟不止，身心疲惫，不得安宁。’
